description: A document used to file or process a claim for unemployment insurance benefits.

claimant_name.instruction: The full legal name of the person filing the unemployment claim.

claimant_id.instruction: The unique identifier for the claimant. This may be labeled as Claimant ID, Customer ID, SSN, or Social Security Number on the document.

date_of_birth.instruction: The date of birth of the claimant.

claim_date.instruction: The date the unemployment claim was filed.

employer_name.instruction: The name of the claimant's most recent employer.

employer_address.instruction: The address of the claimant's most recent employer.

employment_start_date.instruction: The date the claimant started working for the employer.

employment_end_date.instruction: The date the claimant stopped working for the employer.

job_title.instruction: The job title or position held by the claimant.

reason_for_separation.instruction: The reason the claimant is no longer employed such as layoff, termination, resignation, or reduction in hours.

weekly_benefit_amount.instruction: The weekly unemployment benefit amount approved or requested.
